# Sample Characters

These are mostly to demonstrate mechanical systems, and so are relatively light on goals wants and such.


---

## Mya Wells

*High-Concept*: Wide-eyed animal kin. \
*Disadvantage*: Younger than your average bear.

* *Power*: d10
* *Precision*: d8
* *Possibility*: d12

### Boons

* T1: ERR Junior Reservist (free)
* T1: Wide-Eyed animal kin (free)
  * T2: Animals Love me (15xp)
* T1: Younger than your average bear (free)
* T1: Animal Transformation (15xp)
* T1: Pocket Forest Wonderland (15xp)
* T1: Gear: Skateboard (10xp)
* T1: Location: Central Maryland (5xp)

Mya's powers came in when she was twelve, much earlier than most. She can turn into animals with less mass that she has in human form, and all animals absolutely adore her. 

Due to her age, she is part of the Emergency Response Reserves junior program. 

She grew up on rural central maryland, more outside than in, raised by parents with a strong belief in free ranged children. 

Inside of her is a pocket dimension that is wild forest land filled with her animal friends.  When she goes there, she re-appears in the same spot. 

### Other

#### Edges

* Focused Power (free)
* Beyond Human (free)
* Transformative Healing (free)
  * When Mya transforms, she is able to recover from wounds at an inhuman rate.
  * Mya can spend a favor when transforming and make a recovery roll against wounds.  She can only do this once per scene. 

#### Paths

* Path of Wide-eyed Wonder (free) - Path of curiosity, but more naive. 

#### Quests

* Cinderella to the Rescue (free) 
  * Help her animal friends during a real disaster.

---

## Nathan Fergus



*High-Concept*: Special Forces Soldier. \
*Disadvantage*: Made of Stone.

* *Power*: d12
* *Precision*: d10
* *Possibility*: d8

### Boons

* T1: ERR Reservist (free)
* T1: Special Forces Soldier (free)
  * T2: Tactical Awareness (15xp)
* T1: Made of Stone (free)
  * T2: Inhuman Strength (15xp)
* T1: Gear: Sledgehammer (10xp) - Will buy the T2 (Stone Maul) when he has more xp
* T1: Gear: Soldier's Kit (10xp)
* T2: Ally: Ranger Unit (10xp)

Nathan is a special forces soldier who is actually made of stone.  His strength far exceeds human, and he is exceedingly effective with his stone sledgehammer.  His appearance is outputting to most.  The Army accepted him and he made it his family.

He was on leave when everything went down, and his duty now is report the nearest base and return to his unit.  He will obviously help those along the way, but he can be most effective by reporting in. 

### Other

#### Edges

* Focused Power (free)
* Beyond Human (free)
* Unrelenting (free)
  * When Nathan goes all in, he is savage tearing into his enemies without mercy.
  * When Nathan spends a point or favor to re-roll an attribute roll, he activate this edge and re-roll another roll during this scene for free. 

#### Paths

* Path of Membership (free) - Ranger Unit.

#### Quests

* Find my way home (free) 
  * Make contact with special forces command and return to his unit.
